workspace.title: Document Extraction
workspace.selectType: Select a document type from the sidebar to initialize workspace.
workspace.noRecords:
No extraction records yet

Import a document to create the first extraction record.

contextBar.schemaDescription: This definition ensures data consistency and auditability.

status.draftTooltip: Record saved as draft, not yet finalized
status.validatedTooltip: Data verified and compliant with definition
status.invalidTooltip: Record does not meet audit requirements
status.correctedTooltip: Data was manually corrected to match source
status.rejectedTooltip: Document invalid, unreadable, or wrong type

validation.moreErrors: + {count, plural, one {1 more error} other {# more errors}}

messages.cannotValidateInvalid: Cannot validate: document has validation errors

messages.chooseTypeFirst: Choose a domain and document type first.
messages.recordNotAdded: Record schema version mismatch; record was not added.
messages.cannotEditVersion: Cannot edit: record uses schema v{version1} but session is locked to v{version2}.
messages.onlyBLSupported: Export to Seyrura Internal is only supported for BL (Bon de Livraison) documents.
messages.storageNotAvailable: Storage module not enabled / document not available
messages.tenantIdRequired: Tenant ID is required for extraction.

shell.openFromWorkspace: Open from a document type in the workspace.

general.title: General
general.autoValidateDescription: When enabled, newly extracted records are automatically marked as Validated. (WIP)

filters.title: Filters
filters.dateFieldHint: Select a date field to enable filtering

exportResult.itemsCreated: {count, plural, =0 {No item created} one {1 item created} other {# items created}}
